description: Each mandatory principle must have at least one build-failing tripwire and a negative probe.

principles.statement: Constitution-first governance: numbered project principles take precedence and conflicts are flagged to a human.
Two-domain governance: AI-building SDLC governance and AI-usage governance are related but never conflated.
principles.negative_probe: remove GOVERNANCE.md or the standards row

principles.statement: Least privilege and read-only-by-default for external systems; writes require explicit human approval.
principles.negative_probe: enable a default MCP server or remove human approval text

principles.statement: Deterministic authority: anything that must be true is decided by code, rules, tests, schemas, or CI, not by an LLM.
Evidence integrity: generated artifacts are timestamped when appropriate, schema-conformant when a schema exists, and kept in-repo.
principles.negative_probe: edit committed generated evidence by hand

principles.statement: Trust-boundary sanitization: external input is sanitized before LLM consumption or command/file boundaries.
principles.negative_probe: allow raw external text through sanitizer

principles.statement: Source-of-truth authority: repository files, configs, catalogs, schemas, and tests beat memory or model recall.
principles.negative_probe: remove source-of-truth docs or memory warning

principles.statement: Copilot Memory, when available, is supplemental context only; committed files remain authoritative.
Model/provider routing is explicit, secret-free, and subordinate to deterministic gates.
principles.negative_probe: add secret-like model credential or remove approved model config

principles.statement: Governed MCP tool access: external tools are registered, least-privilege, and human-approved before writes.
Copilot-native repository instructions are committed and aligned with the constitution.
Durable architecture/security decisions are recorded in source control.
principles.negative_probe: remove ADR or threat model files

principles.statement: Secrets are never committed and never enter VCS.
Static type hints are checked, not merely requested by convention.
principles.negative_probe: add untyped or type-invalid Python function

principles.statement: Quality gates before commit or merge: typed, linted, green, offline tests.
principles.negative_probe: remove a required command from ci_check

principles.statement: Local equals CI: the same commands run locally and in CI; bare test runner behavior matches `python -m pytest`.
principles.negative_probe: remove pytest pythonpath or make check parity

principles.statement: Deterministic-output tripwire: important deterministic outputs have committed golden fixtures.
Generated artifacts are generated, never hand-edited, and stale generated artifacts fail the build.
AIBOM is generated as AI inventory evidence.
Governance evidence is generated from repository source.
Self-contained tests: tests own fixtures, avoid network and credentials, and do not depend on sibling side effects, gitignored artifacts, or today's date.
principles.negative_probe: test depends on secret, network, or generated side effect

principles.statement: Gate-before-merge: secrets, type check, generated drift, lint, tests with coverage, SAST, and dependency audit block merge.
Machine-user pull request flow: bot may author PRs; human approves; bot cannot self-approve or self-merge.
Machine-user identity is scoped, gated, and audited without hardcoded credentials.
principles.negative_probe: hardcode machine-user credential or require enterprise identity in core

principles.statement: Symphony backlog loop: human curates; worker claims one item, moves it through the board, and stops for approval.
principles.negative_probe: remove Human-only section or stop-for-approval rule

principles.statement: Core agent fireteam ships with every project.
Agents are approved-models-only, audit-logged, no-exfil, and sensitivity-aware.
Playbook -> weapon -> gate maturity: every capability climbs documented -> automated -> enforced.
Independent/adversarial review: a second AI attempts to refute the first AI's output; humans adjudicate disagreements.
Spec-first delivery: every meaningful feature flows through specify -> plan -> tasks -> implement.
Honest documentation: current and target state are labeled separately and docs must match code.
Documentation impact gate: every implementation change includes internal docs, public docs-site/wiki docs, or an explicit no-docs-impact decision.
Three-tier docs boundary: public, contributor, and corporate-governed docs are deliberately separated without making corporate systems a core dependency.
principles.negative_probe: make corporate docs system required for core check

principles.statement: Public wiki/docs-site is curated by audience and built from repository source.
Corporate-governed docs are profile-gated add-ons for policy, registry, RACI, retention, and access control.
Document generation is reproducible from committed source.
Diagram source of truth is explicit and maintainable.
Corporate tenant data governance is optional and complements, never replaces, in-repo sanitization.
principles.negative_probe: make Purview required for sanitizer gate

principles.statement: Governed generated-output publication is dry-run by default and real external publication is profile-gated.
principles.negative_probe: publisher performs external write by default

principles.statement: Framework anchoring maps principles to AI governance frameworks and enforcement locations.
Blast-radius check before edits.
Look-before-you-delete.
Progressive discovery for agent capabilities, distinct from progressive loading in UI.
Personal-scale default: core checks run without M365, Entra, Purview, or any enterprise tenant.
principles.negative_probe: add enterprise-only command to make check

principles.statement: Parallel agents are isolated, atomically claimed, concurrency-capped, budgeted, and merge-serialized.
principles.negative_probe: allow two workers to claim the same backlog item

principles.statement: Security starts at spec time with assume breach, abuse cases, and threat modeling.
principles.negative_probe: remove threat model and abuse cases from spec template

principles.statement: Secrets never enter repository files, logs, stdout, generated artifacts, or LLM context.
principles.negative_probe: add a real secret or remove full-history secret scan job
